title: Starlancer Project
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''Starlancer Project''' or '''Operation Starlancer''' was a secret project created by the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] military to trick the [[Yuuzhan Vong]].<ref name="ELI:RD">''[[The New Jedi Order: Enemy Lines I: Rebel Dream]]''</ref>

==Characteristics==
The project consisted of four ''pipefighters'' (actually modified [[BTL Y-wing starfighter/Legends|BTL Y-wing starfighters]]), three of which would form a triangle, with the fourth in the middle of the triangle. The three triangle fighters would then channel energy into the fourth, which would fire a supposed [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]] [[Laser/Legends|laser]] focused by a [[Yuuzhan Vong]] [[lambent]] crystal.<ref name="ELI:RD" />

==History==
It was meant to be used against the [[Koros-Strohna|worldship]] over [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]. Moments after striking, the beam was swallowed by a [[dovin basal]].<ref name="ELI:RD" />
Two attempts were made by the [[Yuuzhan Vong]] to destroy the weapon's lambent crystal which was used to focus the weapon's laser. Both attempts failed. The weapon met its end at the [[Battle of Borleias (Yuuzhan Vong War; Second)|Second Battle of Borleias]], when squadrons of [[Yorik-et|coralskippers]] attacked the pipefighters.<ref name="ELI:RD" />

The entire project, however, was a ruse designed to keep the Yuuzhan Vong off balance. The New Republic was thus able to convince the Yuuzhan Vong to divert resources towards destroying the ersatz [[Superweapon/Legends|superweapon]] rather than concentrating on other military objectives.<ref name="ELI:RD" />

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Enemy Lines I: Rebel Dream]]'' {{1st}}
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Enemy Lines II: Rebel Stand]]''
*''[[The New Jedi Order: The Unifying Force]]'' {{Mo}}
